title: dronko's dragon survival
description: a vanilla+ styled dragon survival mod pack
body:
can you survive being a dragon? pick one of the types and set out to explor the grate world, from the big deep oceans to the bigest mountans, be warned you cant eat just any food so figure it out quick.

built around the mod dragon survival and with various mods like Sophisticated Storage, reworked train generation, and ports from newer versions, all while being highly optimized with all the optimizations

# features
- deeper oceans
- new ocean mobs
- new planets and trees
- new cave biomes
- new structures
- basic generation rework
- basic nether generation rework
- lava ocean mobs and plants
- new nether structures
- end generation rework
- new end structures
- end trader
- ender dragon fight rework
- Sophisticated Storage
- void totems
- various fun items
- new sounds thrue out the world

icon work in progress
